tool_args.label: Real Estate Disposition Guidelines scope and authority
tool_args.raw_text: These Guidelines apply only to dispositions of real property under Sections 2895-2897 of the Public Authorities Law ("PAL")

payload.claim_text: The MTA Real Estate Real Property Disposition Guidelines apply only to dispositions of real property under Sections 2895-2897 of the Public Authorities Law, including leasing-out or sale of real property and grants of interests in real property such as easements and leasehold interests owned or leased and controlled by the MTA or other MTA Agency.
payload.description: Scope of the Real Property Disposition Guidelines

evidence_refs.source_quote: These Guidelines apply only to dispositions of real property under Sections 2895-2897 of the Public Authorities Law ("PAL"), including leasing-out or sale of real property and grants of interests in real property such as easements and leasehold interests, owned or leased and controlled by the MTA or other MTA Agency.

tool_args.label: TOM group responsibilities
tool_args.raw_text: The TOM group is responsible for all real estate-related transactional matters for the MTA Agencies

payload.claim_text: The TOM (Transactions & Operations) group within MTA Real Estate is responsible for all real estate-related transactional matters (other than real estate development matters and major capital projects) for the MTA Agencies, including acquisitions, dispositions, and leasing of MTA Property, tenant management, and management and operations of MTA Facilities.
payload.description: TOM group responsibilities within MTA Real Estate

tool_args.label: TOD group responsibilities
tool_args.raw_text: The TOD group is responsible for all real estate-related development matters

payload.claim_text: The TOD (Transit-Oriented Development) group within MTA C&D is responsible for all real estate-related development matters, including acquisitions and dispositions of real property for long-term revenue generation and transportation facilities, major capital projects, and public-private partnerships.
payload.description: TOD group responsibilities within MTA C&D
